rationale: Adds a schedule-aware status pill to index.html: CSS classes .s-green/.s-cyan/.s-amber/.s-purple/.s-gray flip a --state-color CSS custom property that the .live dot and .status-text span pick up via color/text-shadow with a 280ms fade transition. The inline JS IIFE computes Hong Kong time by shifting Date.now() by 8h (avoiding DST since HKT is UTC+8 year-round), uses pickState(h) to map (day, hour) to one of the documented states ('online · HKT' for Mon-Fri 08-22, 'wrapping up · HKT' for 22-24, 'offline · back 08:00 HKT' for 00-08, weekend 'weekend · slow replies' 09-22, 'offline · back monday' for Sun 22-24, and weekend default 'offline · back 09:00 HKT'), and re-runs apply() via setInterval every 60s. The state grid in code matches the PR body's documented table exactly; clean feature addition with no cheating.
